Notes.Text:
This update for ocaml fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2026-28364: missing bounds validation in readblock() can lead to arbitrary code execution (bsc#1258992).
Notes.Title: Details

Vulnerabilities.Description: In OCaml before 4.14.3 and 5.x before 5.4.1, a buffer over-read in Marshal deserialization (runtime/intern.c) enables remote code execution through a multi-phase attack chain. The vulnerability stems from missing bounds validation in the readblock() function, which performs unbounded memcpy() operations using attacker-controlled lengths from crafted Marshal data.
